'''ân-m-p-d''' ('''kanampedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exit|exit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-m-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exit|exit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-m-p-d
|-
! Lemma
| kanampedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinampedoko|thinampedoko]] || [[word:jinampedoko|jinampedoko]] || [[word:shinampedoko|shinampedoko]] || [[word:kinampedoko|kinampedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunampedoko|thunampedoko]] || [[word:junampedoko|junampedoko]] || [[word:shunampedoko|shunampedoko]] || [[word:kunampedoko|kunampedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonampedoko|thonampedoko]] || [[word:jonampedoko|jonampedoko]] || [[word:shonampedoko|shonampedoko]] || [[word:konampedoko|konampedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚnampedoko|thĂŚnampedoko]] || [[word:jĂŚnampedoko|jĂŚnampedoko]] || [[word:shĂŚnampedoko|shĂŚnampedoko]] || [[word:kĂŚnampedoko|kĂŚnampedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanampedoko|thathanampedoko]] || [[word:jajanampedoko|jajanampedoko]] || [[word:shashanampedoko|shashanampedoko]] || [[word:kakanampedoko|kakanampedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanampedoko|thanampedoko]] || [[word:janampedoko|janampedoko]] || [[word:shanampedoko|shanampedoko]] || [[word:kanampedoko|kanampedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
